reviews.comment:
El pesonal de YPF todos muy atentos! Y serviciales. Luego tuvimos  un problema con la moto. Y debimos llevarla hasta Salta Capital. El transorte de ACA no esta en Cachi pero  llego a tiempo. Cumplieron con todas nuestras espectativas, el chofer que nos llevo excelente su comportamiento. Estamos agradecidos !!!  No nos dejo hasta que estemos en un lugar que nos realice el trabajo.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF staff were all very attentive and helpful! Later, we had a problem with the motorcycle and had to take it all the way to Salta. The ACA transport service isn't in Cachi, but they arrived on time. They met all our expectations, and the driver who took us was excellent. We are very grateful! He didn't leave us until we were somewhere that could do the work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xKWFIwOVhRekY1VUdWWlVGZFJXR2h2UkZKUE9GRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muchas gracias al personal de la estación de servicio de Cachi, me olvidé mi teléfono celular en el baño y me lo devolvieron...Muy agradecida con ustedes, un abrazo grande Gracias x Todo!!!

(Translated by Google)
Many thanks to the staff at the Cachi gas station. I forgot my cell phone in the bathroom and they returned it to me... I'm so grateful, a big hug! Thank you for everything!!!
